title: The Credit Of The Conqueror.
content:
He who commends the vanquished, speaks the power
    And glorifies the worthy conqueror.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Credit Of The Conqueror.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
